## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (go vet + gofmt)
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Web changes: `cd apps/web && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build` pass
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — DCO, inbound = outbound (Apache-2.0)
